nodes.name: assessment_questions.json
nodes.summary: Seed bank of ENM-readiness assessment questions (scale and multi-select), each tagged with a domain, weight, and sort order, consumed via ContentLoader.loadAssessmentQuestions(). Several entries are flagged as placeholders pending validated content.

nodes.name: cards.json
nodes.summary: Card-session content deck: education, prompt, and educationPrompt cards keyed to a category_id, with speaking-turn, difficulty, sensitivity, and free/paid gating. Loaded through ContentLoader.loadCards() to drive the couple card experience.

nodes.name: categories.json
nodes.summary: Category taxonomy for the Learn/card content (communication, boundaries, intimacy, etc.) with SF Symbol icons, phase grouping, card counts, and unlock gating. Loaded via ContentLoader.loadCategories() to organize and gate content sections.

nodes.name: desire_items.json
nodes.summary: Desire Map item catalog: per-item name, description, category, sensitivity, track membership (curious/established), and track-specific answer scales. Decoded into the DesireItem model via ContentLoader.loadDesireItems() to populate the Desire Map rater.
